title: IPZ-382 The past that a beautiful librarian wants to erase Kaede Fuyutsuki
overview: There was a secret that she couldn't tell ... The past of a shy and quiet beauty librarian was a mistress ... A man who knew the past threatened to play naked shame in the sacred hall, and semen was discharged into her mouth but she couldn't spit it out ... Furthermore, a chain of forcible sexual intercourse from those who witnessed the whole story! The innocent heart and beautiful naked body are polluted by the obscene acts that unfold in the hall!
